topic_priors.rationale: Round 2 confirmed: H4 has real physical pathway (47ft single-year precedent + Section 6E release reduction); ENSO transition to El Niño reduces summer monsoon recovery hope; April→August revisions historically ±30-40 ft. Net: H4 up 5pp (real pathway anchored), H3 down 3pp (April projection more anchored to current 1055), H2 down 2pp.
